description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a loose-fitting hooded sweatshirt with a front pocket and drawstrings. The figure wears slim-fit pants that taper at the ankles, paired with low-top sneakers that have a thick sole. The head is adorned with a voluminous, side-parted hairstyle that covers the forehead and ears. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly apart. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and a neutral facial expression. The clothing and shoes are modeled with smooth surfaces and minimal textural detail, giving the figure a clean, modern appearance suitable for contemporary city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a hooded sweatshirt, slim pants, and sneakers, featuring a side-parted hairstyle and a relaxed, neutral stance. The figure has smooth, stylized surfaces and realistic proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hooded sweatshirt, front pocket, drawstrings, and full facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the hood's shape, and the side seam of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hood, the fit of the sweatshirt, and the back of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm extension, and the side of the pants and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt and slim-fit pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
